description: A site-wide search widget with a text input, hidden filter, submit button, and a mobile toggle button for showing/hiding the search dropdown.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard site search widget as it appears in the site header

notes: All 15 sampled pages (duplicates: 14, textVaries: false) share an identical DOM structure with no variable content. All text, labels, placeholder, form action, and aria-labels are hardcoded constants — no props are needed. The .site-search-toggle button is only visible on small screens (hide-for-medium class), and shows/hides the search form. The search-autocomplete wrapper enables autocomplete behaviour via a CSS class hook.
